summary: Tested StockBud bug fixes and new features. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend verified - Dashboard, Visualization (6 tabs), and StampAssignments pages load correctly with proper functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Code modularization is properly implemented with database.py, auth.py, models.py, and services/ directory
Stamp sorting uses stamp_sort_key() which extracts numbers for proper numerical sorting (1, 2, 3... 10, 11 not 1, 10, 11, 2)
Dashboard reads from both stamp_verifications and stamp_approvals for verification status
Auto-normalize stamps is called after every upload (opening_stock, transactions, physical_stock, master_stock)
Browser notifications implemented via Web Notification API in AuthContext.jsx with permission request
Seasonal AI analysis endpoint uses Hindu calendar festivals (Diwali, Holi, Salakh, Dhanteras, Karva Chauth, Sankrant)
Historical data upload endpoint for AI training is separate from main transactions (doesn't affect stock calculations)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Visualization with 6 tabs, StampAssignments all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified. Stamps are sorted numerically on both dashboard and stamp assignments pages. Visualization has 6 tabs (Sales, Purchases, Health, Seasonal, History, AI). No stamp approvals/verifications in DB yet - all stamps show 'Never verified'. Stamps are in 'Stamp X' format (auto_normalize_stamps will convert to 'STAMP X' on next upload).

stamp_sorting.stamp_verification_api: Returns stamps sorted numerically using stamp_sort_key()

dashboard.stamp_verification_table: Shows all 21 stamps with 'Never' verified and 'Needs Verification' status
dashboard.stats_cards: Total Transactions: 3520, Total Parties: 582, Purchases: 82, Sales: 3306

visualization_tabs.tab_1_sales: Top Items by Sales (kg) with color-coded tiers, Sales by Customer, Monthly Trend
visualization_tabs.tab_3_health: Movement Tier Distribution pie, Stock Health bars (red/green/yellow)
visualization_tabs.tab_4_seasonal: Hindu calendar analysis with Run Seasonal Analysis button
visualization_tabs.tab_5_history: Historical Data Upload for AI training (Year, Type, File upload)
visualization_tabs.tab_6_ai: Smart Analytics with question input and Claude-powered insights

stamp_assignments_page.assignment_controls: Select Stamp, Select User dropdowns, Assign button

browser_notifications.polling: pollNotifications() every 60 seconds for new alerts
